# Nature Portfolio Reporting Summary download notes

Downloaded and prepared on 19 May 2026 for the NBT upload package in this folder.

Official Nature source page: https://www.nature.com/nclimate/editorial-policies/reporting-standards

Official files used:

- Fillable Reporting Summary PDF: https://www.nature.com/documents/nr-reporting-summary.pdf
- Flat reference copy: https://www.nature.com/documents/nr-reporting-summary-flat.pdf

Nature states that the fillable forms use advanced PDF features and should be opened in Adobe Reader. For command-line validation, the fillable file is an XFA PDF, so normal PDF text extraction will not show the completed values until the form is opened by an XFA-aware PDF viewer. For review and upload convenience, this folder contains both the completed XFA PDF and a human-readable completed PDF/DOCX generated from the same field responses.

Generated files:

- Nature_Portfolio_Reporting_Summary_official_fillable.pdf: official fillable XFA form downloaded from Nature.
- Nature_Portfolio_Reporting_Summary_official_fillable_completed_xfa.pdf: official fillable XFA form with completed dataset values inserted.
- Nature_Portfolio_Reporting_Summary_official_flat_reference.pdf: official flat reference copy downloaded from Nature.
- Nature_Portfolio_Reporting_Summary_completed.docx: completed responses in official field order.
- Nature_Portfolio_Reporting_Summary_completed.pdf: human-readable completed PDF generated from the same responses.
